title: May 2024 things — pre-Asia-trip logistics, OpenAI announcement, peer wager app, packing list
html:
May 2024 things — pre-Asia-trip logistics, OpenAI announcement, peer wager app, packing list

Source: 2024-05-13 Apple Note. Six weeks of running TODOs covering the OpenAI GPT-4o announcement day, India ticket buying, Shanghai prep, Cloud Dev finals, contact-lens errands, and the very first written ["peer wager app"] mention.

TL;DR

  • Day 1 (5/13/24): "OpenAI announcement — This is appearing to be a monumental moment that may decide the future of what I do, idk??" — captured live on GPT-4o announcement day. Yahir's first explicit recognition that AI was inflecting his career planning.
  • First "peer wager app" written by name (5/30 batch) — alongside "replace security and simple human interface" and "extension for travel requirement." Becomes a recurring stealth-app candidate.
  • The mindless-jobs hit-list (re: AI replacement targets): parking garage attendant, toll booth collector, security guard checking IDs, museum ticket seller, hotel security (original idea), retail store greeter, stadium ticket checker, gym front desk verifying memberships, retail cashier — the mindless human interface disruption thesis crystallizing.
  • Shanghai trip dialing in: CIEE bills, Ford Family Foundation budget, JCEF coordination, China visa process, Mei Dong contact, contact-lens supplies for the trip, Anki notecard prep.
  • Decision menu (recurring throughout): Asset tokenization vs Disrupting security/human interfaces vs Truck driver ads vs Smart home integration service (Mark Cuban). Yahir clearly considering several thesis directions.
  • The letter-to-self imperative (recurring 3x): "write yourself a letter 1 year from now, 3 years from now, 5 years from now, 10 years from now, 20 years from now" — never executed in the visible corpus but becomes a recurring TODO.
  • Sophie Fuji blog plug: links to sophiefuji.com/decisions.html and /travels.html — "fire blogs." Inspirational source for Sophie Fuji as a model.
  • Quote saved: "the goal of the game is to keep playing, not to cash out or take advantage of others, that the goal is to create more value than you capture."
  • Packing inventory: 9 shorts, 2 pants, 12 underwear, 13 shirts, 1 hoodie. Missing: black pants, red bandana, sweats.

Pattern observed

This is the decision-making layer between the April Sam breakup and the August Asia trip departure. Three weeks of running TODOs document Yahir making the China-trip happen logistically while also mentally choosing his next thesis direction. The mindless-jobs hit-list is the proto-Rankett thesis before it had a name — different vertical (security/check-in vs SEO) but same insight: automate away the human interface that nobody wants to do anyway.

The letter-to-self imperative appears here for the first time and recurs in 2024 12 21 todos and beyond — it's a meta-task Yahir keeps writing and never doing.

Key quote

"Disconnected from the outcome" — single-line meditation amid the TODO blizzard. The phrase becomes a recurring concept.

Open questions

  • The "smart home integration service (Mark Cuban)" idea — was this from a Mark Cuban podcast/tweet?
  • Did Sophie Fuji's blog actually influence Yahir's writing? (His blog never quite happened — recurring "get blog up and running" TODO across years.)
  • Why did Yahir pursue mindless-human-interface-disruption (toll booths, security) but eventually pivot to AI-search? Was the latter just easier to start?
